creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
After applying the patch provided by Chris, I made some fixes to
pkg-plist and rolled out another unified diff to include those fixes
in addition to Chris' changes.

These pkg-plist issues likely crept up between 3.8.x and 3.9.x, sorry
I didn't catch them sooner.

Also I seem to have sent a reply with multi-part content which didn't
actually get tied to the ticket.  So I'll try to stick the new patch
on here again.  Apologies if I duplicate something.
